definitions: To arrive at a place or destination.
To have an opportunity or privilege to do something.
To annoy, irritate, or upset someone.
To begin to affect someone or something.
examples: We need to get to the airport by 3 PM.
I finally got to see my favorite band live.
His constant complaining really gets to me.
The cold weather is starting to get to the plants.
Can you get to the top shelf?
